scripts.build:ts: bun build src/app/main.ts --outdir www/app/js --sourcemap=external && bun build src/injected/ts/addmenu.ts --outdir www/injected/js --sourcemap=external
scripts.copy:assets: mkdir -p www/app/css www/injected/html www/injected/css/rules && cp src/app/style.css www/app/css/ && cp -r src/injected/html/* www/injected/html/ && cp src/injected/css/rules/* www/injected/css/rules/ && cp src/app/index.html www/
scripts.build: bun run build:ts && bun run copy:assets
scripts.sync: bun run build && bunx cap sync
scripts.build:android: bun run sync && bunx cap copy android && bunx cap open android
scripts.build:ios: bun run sync && bunx cap copy ios && bunx cap open ios
